sv.note: 54C = medium-rare (Baldwin 130F=54.5C). Whole-muscle seared steak safe at MR. Picanha ~35mm -> 55C 30mm=3h if full pasteurization wanted.

smoke.note: Hot finish after SV: chamber ~225F/107C short; final MR 130-135F. Oak/cherry/pecan beef-friendly.

smoke_only.note: Reverse sear from raw: indirect 225F/107C, pull at 115F/46C then blazing sear to 130-135F.

safe.note: Displayed floor 63C (145F, path-agnostic). SV path pasteurizes by time at >=54.4C; seared whole-muscle MR is safe (interior sterile, surface seared).

rationale: Confirmed 54C MR, smoke temps/wood vs AmazingRibs sous-vide-que. safe kept 63 (path-agnostic displayed floor); 54.4C SV floor noted.

sv.ref: Baldwin — core temps + thickness; Serious Eats/Kenji thick-cut timing
sv.note: svh 2->2-3: tomahawk eye ~55mm needs ~2.5-3h to reach core (was 2h, short). 54C MR.

smoke.note: Hot finish ~225F/107C then sear; final 130-135F. Hickory (strong)+oak.

safe.note: Displayed floor 63C. 50mm at 55C pasteurizes 4.5h (Baldwin); seared MR whole-muscle safe.

rationale: svh 2->2-3 (thick ~55mm needs time to reach core). safe kept 63. Smoke/wood confirmed.

sv.note: 54C MR. Tri-tip ~45mm; 4-6h gives MR + tenderness (55C 50mm pasteurizes 4.5h).

smoke.note: Hot smoke finish ~225F/107C ~0.5h then sear. Oak first choice for tri-tip; hickory adds strength.

smoke_only.note: 2-3lb ~2h to 110-115F at 225F, then sear to 130F MR. 120C under 250F/121C ceiling.

safe.note: Displayed floor 63C. ~45mm at 55C pasteurizes ~4h; seared MR whole-muscle safe.

rationale: Confirmed 54C/4-6h and reverse-sear (oak first choice). safe kept 63.

sv.ref: Baldwin — core temps; Anova/ChefSteps prime rib
sv.note: 56C = MR-to-medium, even edge-to-edge for large roasts. 3.5kg ~120mm; 6-8h reaches core (>12h risks mushy per Baldwin).

smoke.note: Indirect 225F/107C; light smoke finish ~1h then sear. Meathead 2-4oz light hardwood/fruitwood.

smoke_only.note: 225F/107C to 115F/46C (~3h+ large roast), rest, then sear to 130-135F.

safe.note: Displayed floor 63C. 56C for 6-8h fully pasteurizes; core well above SV floor.

rationale: svt/smoke/wood confirmed (AmazingRibs prime rib). safe kept 63.

sv.note: 54C MR. 2.5kg strip ~70mm; 55C reaches core ~4-6h, well pasteurized.

smoke.note: Hot finish ~225F/107C ~0.75h then sear to 130-135F. Oak+hickory.

safe.note: Displayed floor 63C. 70mm at 55C pasteurizes well under the 4-6h cook; seared MR whole-muscle safe.

rationale: Confirmed 54C/4-6h, reverse-sear vs AmazingRibs. safe kept 63.

sv.ref: Baldwin — core temps; Serious Eats/Kenji lean cuts
sv.note: 54C MR. Lean tenderloin ~60mm: 2-4h heat-through + brief tenderize (Kenji cooks lean a touch lower than marbled).

smoke.note: Gentle hot finish 100C ~0.5h then quick sear; keeps lean cut moist. Cherry/oak light smoke.

smoke_only.note: 225-250F to 115F/46C (~1.5h center-cut) then sear to 130F MR.

safe.note: Displayed floor 63C. ~60mm at 55C pasteurizes within a few h; seared MR whole-muscle safe.

rationale: Confirmed 54C MR, gentle finish (Kenji/AmazingRibs). safe kept 63.

sv.ref: Baldwin — core temps + long-hold tenderizing of coarse-grain cuts
sv.note: 56C (MR-plus) with 8-12h softens coarse bavette grain while pink. Thin ~25mm pasteurizes fast; long time for tenderness.

smoke.note: Hot finish ~225F/107C short then hard sear (thin cut). Oak/hickory.

smoke_only.note: Low smoke 225F/107C to render/flavor then sear to 130-135F; thin cut watch overshoot.

safe.note: Displayed floor 63C. 56C for 8-12h vastly exceeds pasteurization.

rationale: Confirmed 56C long hold tenderizes coarse grain. safe kept 63.

sv.ref: Baldwin — core temps; Kenji fatty cuts
sv.note: 54C MR. Rolled cap ~40mm -> 3-4h reaches core and pasteurizes (55C 30mm=3h). Very fatty; 54-57C both valid, kept MR.

smoke.note: Hot finish ~225F/107C short then sear. Pecan (sweet strong)+oak.

smoke_only.note: 225-250F to 115F/46C then sear to MR 130F. Fatty cap benefits from more render.

safe.note: Displayed floor 63C. 40mm at 55C pasteurizes ~3.5h; seared MR whole-muscle safe.

sv.ref: Baldwin — core temps + long-hold for lean round
sv.note: 56C with 8-10h tenderizes lean top round while pink; higher than 54.5 helps this dry cut. ~90mm so long time fully pasteurizes.

smoke.note: Hot finish ~225F/107C ~0.75h then sear to 130-135F. Cherry+pecan light smoke.

smoke_only.note: 225F/107C to 115F/46C (~3h ~90mm lean) then sear to 130F; avoid overshoot.

safe.note: Displayed floor 63C. 56C for 8-10h far exceeds pasteurization for 90mm.

rationale: Confirmed 56C long hold for lean round. safe kept 63.

sv.ref: Baldwin — core temps + long-hold for tougher rump
sv.note: 56C/8h tenderizes rump (culotte) while pink. ~80mm so 8h reaches core and pasteurizes.

smoke.note: tgt 57->56 to equal SV core (core cannot exceed 56C bath). Hot finish ~225F/107C then sear. Cherry/oak.

rationale: tgt 57->56 to match SV core (bath caps core). safe kept 63; svt/svh/smoke confirmed.

sv.ref: Baldwin — core temps; Serious Eats/Anova hanger (naturally tender)
sv.note: 54C MR. Hanger ~40mm tender: 1.5-2h reaches core; can extend 3-4h for tenderness.

smoke.note: Short hot finish ~225F/107C then quick hard sear (thinner cut). Oak/hickory.

smoke_only.note: Low smoke 225F/107C to ~115F/46C then sear to 130F; ~40mm so ~0.5h.

safe.note: Displayed floor 63C. Full pasteurization of ~40mm at 55C ~3.5h; 1.5-2h serves MR eaten hot (danger-zone <4h). Seared whole-muscle safe.

rationale: Confirmed 54C MR, short times. safe kept 63; cold-smoke->sear path in smoke_only.

sv.ref: Baldwin — core temps; Serious Eats thin cut
sv.note: 54C MR. Skirt thin ~15-20mm: 1-1.5h reaches core; 55C 20mm pasteurizes ~2.5h if held. Sears very fast.

smoke.note: Very short hot finish then blazing sear (thin cut). Oak versatile for red meat.

smoke_only.ref: AmazingRibs — reverse sear / cook steak like a pro
smoke_only.note: Thin skirt: brief low smoke 225F/107C then immediate hard sear to 130F; ~0.4h.

safe.note: Displayed floor 63C. 20mm at 55C pasteurizes ~2.5h; thin cut, hold longer if pasteurization required. Seared whole-muscle safe.

rationale: Confirmed thin-cut short times. safe kept 63; reverse cold-smoke->sear in smoke_only, no raw-smoke->SV (thin cut danger-zone).
